accessibility_rules: No justified text; always left-align body copy to assist tracking.
Avoid all-caps for long text; use only for short labels with wide tracking.
Ensure distinct letter shapes (I, l, 1) by using Nunito.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, generous whitespace to reduce cognitive load (DSA friendly).
spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen bg-[#F8F9FA] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative

buttons.primary: bg-[#E63946] text-white font-bold text-lg rounded-2xl border-b-4 border-[#B91C1C] active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all py-4 px-6 flex items-center justify-center w-full shadow-sm hover:brightness-110
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFD166] text-[#2B2D42] font-bold text-lg rounded-2xl border-b-4 border-[#FFB703] active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all py-4 px-6 flex items-center justify-center w-full shadow-sm hover:brightness-110
buttons.outline: bg-white text-[#6C757D] font-bold text-lg rounded-2xl border-2 border-b-4 border-[#DEE2E6] active:border-b-2 active:translate-y-[2px] transition-all py-4 px-6 flex items-center justify-center w-full
buttons.success: bg-[#06D6A0] text-white font-bold text-lg rounded-2xl border-b-4 border-[#04A77D] active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all py-4 px-6

cards.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#DEE2E6] rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-sm
cards.interactive: bg-white border-2 border-[#DEE2E6] border-b-4 rounded-3xl p-5 cursor-pointer active:border-b-2 active:translate-y-[2px] transition-all hover:bg-gray-50
cards.selected: bg-[#E63946]/10 border-2 border-[#E63946] border-b-4 rounded-3xl p-5 cursor-pointer text-[#E63946]

inputs.default: w-full bg-[#F8F9FA] border-2 border-[#DEE2E6] rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-lg text-[#2B2D42] focus:border-[#118AB2] focus:ring-0 outline-none transition-colors placeholder:text-[#ADB5BD]

progress_bar.fill_xp: h-full bg-[#FFD166] rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out
progress_bar.fill_lesson: h-full bg-[#06D6A0] rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out

navigation_bar.container: fixed bottom-0 max-w-md w-full bg-white border-t-2 border-[#DEE2E6] flex justify-around items-center py-3 px-2 pb-safe z-50
navigation_bar.item: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 rounded-xl text-[#ADB5BD] hover:text-[#2B2D42] transition-colors

motion_and_interactions.button_press: Scale down slightly and reduce border-bottom width to simulate physical push.
motion_and_interactions.confetti: Use react-confetti for the lesson completion screen.
motion_and_interactions.mascot_jump: Use framer-motion to animate the tortellino jumping between path nodes.

home_path.layout: Vertical scrollable area with a zig-zag placement of level nodes.
home_path.level_node: w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-b-[6px] flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-bold shadow-md relative

lesson_view.header: Top bar containing close button (X), Progress Bar, and Hearts/Lives icon.
lesson_view.content: Large question text, followed by 3-4 interactive cards for multiple choice.
lesson_view.footer: Fixed bottom area containing a giant 'Check' or 'Continue' button.

celebration_screen.layout: Centered content, mascot image scaled up, large XP reward text (+15 XP), continue button.

mascot.description: The main Tortellino mascot. Use this as the app icon, on the welcome screen, jumping on the path, and in the celebration screen. Use with a rounded-full or custom mask if needed, as it has a red background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a responsive web app that looks and feels like a mobile app. Constrain the main layout to 'max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden' to simulate a mobile screen on desktop.
Implement the Duolingo 'tactile' button style everywhere: solid background with a darker, thicker border-bottom, and translate-y on active state.

For the lesson path (Homepage), create a scrollable vertical container. Use absolute positioning or flex with alternating self-alignments (e.g., self-start, self-center, self-end) to create a winding path of level buttons.
Place the Tortellino mascot image on top of the currently active level node.
Ensure the UI is DSA-friendly: large fonts (Nunito), left-aligned text, high contrast, and no confusing background patterns. Keep the background a solid off-white (#F8F9FA).
Use framer-motion for the mascot jumps, button taps, and modal slide-ups.
For the lesson exercises, implement at least a Multiple Choice and a True/False component with clear selected/unselected states.
Include a fixed bottom navigation bar for the main screens (Home, Saved Questions, Profile).
Use Lucide icons for all UI iconography.
